channel.title: Nlp on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Nlp on Home

item.title: Can AI find what keyword search can't? A pilot on Dutch policy documents
item.author: robzwitserlood@tuta.io (Rob Zwitserlood)
item.description: We built an AI-powered search engine to help PBL researchers find agricultural subsidy documents buried in hundreds of thousands of Dutch policy publications. Here’s what worked, what didn’t, and what surprised us.
